subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification, mention and splendor, befit the exalted station of the Most High Pen, which at every moment yieldeth forth pearls of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا ذکر و بها لایق مقام بلند قلم اعلی است که در هر آن لئالی حکمت و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
